title: HR Data Analyst
modalContent: Spearheaded a centralised Metabase and SQL dashboard to consolidate HR, GA, Labour, and Finance metrics.
Orchestrated a new 360 review and performance management system, significantly reducing manual processing.
Conducted A/B testing to systematically evaluate and optimise key HR initiatives.
Automated Group Leader (GL) Pool selection using Python, objectively ranking candidates.
Engineered Python scripts to consolidate fragmented competency data for 2,500+ employees.
Built predictive models to forecast monthly absenteeism and analysed unique sickness patterns.

title: Freelance AI Tutor
modalContent: Annotated complex datasets to ensure model alignment with strict ethical, safety, and helpfulness standards.
Validated AI credibility by rigorously cross-referencing generated answers against authoritative sources.
Benchmarked model performance against leading LLMs to provide actionable refinement feedback.

title: HR Data Analyst
modalContent: Consolidated fragmented HR data into a centralised database and designed interactive dashboards.
Automated Annual Assessments and Personality Profiling via advanced Excel tools, reducing evaluation time by 76.9%.
Enforced 100% data integrity across Attendance and Demographics through rigorous data cleaning protocols.

title: Development Staff
modalContent: Optimized component design to mitigate up to 70% of production errors through proactive design validation and technical troubleshooting.
Engineered precision jigs and measurement gauges to standardize assembly accuracy and streamline production workflows.
Managed centralized operational data for inventory control and resource distribution to ensure seamless production cycles.
Developed data-driven systems for department tool management and warehouse logistics to optimize resource availability.
